# NextJS Pnpm Fixture

This fixture exercises the scanner against a typical Next.js + pnpm + Prisma project layout used in the worclaude detection tests.

## Installation

1. Install dependencies with `pnpm install`.
2. Set `DATABASE_URL` in `.env`.
3. Run `pnpm dev` to start the dev server.

## Architecture

Standard Next.js app router with a Prisma schema under `prisma/`.
